title: Grimoire Ascension
description: Step into a world filled with magic, grimoires, and powerful battles inspired by the universe of Black Clover.
body:
![dcicon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f774f1f2dd18f7f4d2f29fcf3545f7743b164f4e.png)


Join the community: [Black Clover: Grimoire Ascension](https://discord.gg/KqhV5SBuUC)


![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6d7ebd6e31f087e098014b0b2de545f1ae02b1b.png)

## ! BIG NOTE ! | This Mod is still in very early development
---

##  Controls:
- 1st Ability: Key(1)
- 2nd Ability: Key(2)
- 3d Ability: Key(3)
- 4th Ability: Key(4)
- 5th Ability: Key(5)

---

Players can discover different types of mana, unlock powerful spells, and obtain rare grimoires that grant unique abilities. Train your magic, face dangerous devils, and rise through the ranks to become one of the strongest mages in the Clover Kingdom.

Whether you choose to master elemental magic, forbidden spells, or devil powers, your journey to greatness begins here.

---
 
##  Current Features:
- Infernal Grimoare 
- Infernal Powers(No Awakening)
- Craftible Items
- Normal Chest (1/10 chance to get a Grimoare 
- Normal Key (used to open Normal Chest)


---

## Other Info: 


### Required Mods:

- Photon
